testcase.name: testPerformDivision_DelegatestoService
testcase.system-out: 11:06:03.796 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityMeasurementController initialised 11:06:03.841 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityDTO(10.0, KILOGRAM) DIVIDE QuantityDTO(5.0, KILOGRAM) = 2.0

testcase.name: testPerformComparison_ErrorResult_Logged
testcase.system-out: 11:06:03.862 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityMeasurementController initialised 11:06:03.863 [main] ERROR c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- Operation failed: Cannot compare different categories

testcase.name: testPerformAddition_DelegatestoService
testcase.system-out: 11:06:03.866 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityMeasurementController initialised 11:06:03.867 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityDTO(1.0, KILOGRAM) ADD -> null

testcase.name: testPerformConversion_DelegatestoService
testcase.system-out: 11:06:03.875 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityMeasurementController initialised 11:06:03.876 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityDTO(1.0, FEET) CONVERT -> QuantityDTO(12.0, INCH)

testcase.name: testPerformComparison_DelegatestoService
testcase.system-out: 11:06:03.878 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityMeasurementController initialised 11:06:03.879 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityDTO(1.0, FEET) == QuantityDTO(12.0, INCH) -> true

testcase.name: testPerformSubtraction_DelegatestoService
testcase.system-out: 11:06:03.891 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityMeasurementController initialised 11:06:03.892 [main] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- QuantityDTO(10.0, FEET) SUBTRACT -> null
